name: EvilPunk
short_description: VR Rogue-like shooter game set in a dark Western world. How long can you survive? Fight against the demon army and shed light on the darkness. The fate of humanity is at the tip of your barrel.
detailed_description:
EvilPunk is a VR Rogue-like shooter game set in a dark Western world. In Rogue-like mode discover different ways to defeat your enemies by collecting buffs in procedurally generated levels. In Campaign mode, you’ll need to defend your hometown from an onslaught of demonic forces. Armed with a range of weapons and strategic skills, you’ll face waves of enemies and prevent the Church from being sieged.

Discover and tame a new west with EvilPunk's brand new game mode. Start the fight with your Revolvers. Survive by fighting various enemies. Get reward chests at the end of the level. Collect over 40 cards that will give you a different ability each time and create your own unique play style.

  • Combat Levels

Fight in a new battlefield with constantly changing locations and objects that will give you the opportunity to develop different strategies each time.

  • Event Levels

Discover Event Levels where you will receive rewards or punishments based on your actions and the options you choose.

Witness the story of Sheriff Salomon's fight against the demon army through his eyes in Base Defense mode. Become the world's last line of defense by using all the resources at your disposal. Each victory will take the relentless fight against the dark forces one step further, while each defeat will make you stronger.

After fighting through waves of enemies, challenging boss fights await you. Each Boss has its own unique mechanics to discover. Discover them and use their weaknesses against them to achieve victory.

While fighting different types of enemies, choose the weapon that suits your style to create the most effective strategies. You need to plan every step carefully in order to survive by applying the best tactics in tough battles.

Your progress through the depends on how you manage your resources. Kill the enemies you encounter and collect their drop.

  • Rogue Like Mode

Purchase or upgrade cards and weapons or continue to survive by purchasing supplies from stores that will randomly appear as you progress through the Levels.

  • Campaign Mode

In between waves, buy supplies from the Shop or continue the fight with a new weapon.

Enemies will become stronger on each level, which will require constant upgrades and development of your weapons. As you pass the levels, you will be able to upgrade your weapons as you wish with the special coins you collect and have the opportunity to use them at their full power.

Increase your chances of survival by drinking and eating consumables found almost everywhere you can see on the map, in the environment, in the city, in the houses.

Dig the graves on the map and collect the rewards inside. Explode the surrounding barrels and make it easier to kill your enemies. Discover different ways to kill your enemies by using many more objects.

You can join our Discord server to support our game, stay up to date on its development, and give us feedback!
